duas.title: Morning Protection
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka al-'afiyah fid-dunya wal-akhirah
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Hereafter

duas.title: Entering the Morning
duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillahi wal-hamdulillah
duas.translation: We have entered the morning and the dominion belongs to Allah, and all praise is for Allah

duas.title: Evening Remembrance
duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillahi wal-hamdulillah
duas.translation: We have entered the evening and the dominion belongs to Allah, and all praise is for Allah

duas.title: Master of Forgiveness
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no god but You. You created me and I am Your servant

duas.title: Seeking Refuge
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created

duas.title: Three Quls Protection
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Rahim. Qul huwa Allahu ahad
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Say: He is Allah, the One

duas.title: Trust in Allah
duas.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
duas.transliteration: Hasbiyal-lahu la ilaha illa huwa, 'alayhi tawakkaltu
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but Him. I have placed my trust in Him

duas.title: Protection from Evil Eye
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing can harm on earth or in heaven

duas.title: Before Eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah

duas.title: After Eating
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَجَعَلَنَا مُسْلِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at'amana wa saqana wa ja'alana muslimin
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah Who has fed us, given us drink, and made us Muslims

duas.title: When Forgetting Bismillah
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi awwalahu wa akhirahu
duas.translation: In the name of Allah at the beginning and at the end

duas.title: When Breaking Fast
duas.arabic: ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Dhahaba zama'u wabtallatil-'uruqu wa thabatal-ajru insha'Allah
duas.translation: The thirst has gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills

duas.title: Before Sleeping
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live

duas.title: Upon Waking
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah Who gave us life after causing us to die, and to Him is the resurrection

duas.title: Ayatul Kursi Before Sleep
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum
duas.translation: Allah, there is no god but He, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining

duas.title: When Having Bad Dream
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajim
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from Satan, the accursed

duas.title: Unable to Sleep
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ غَارَتِ النُّجُومُ وَهَدَأَتِ الْعُيُونُ وَأَنْتَ حَيٌّ قَيُّومٌ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma gharatin-nujum, wa hada'atil-'uyun, wa anta Hayyun Qayyum
duas.translation: O Allah, the stars have set and eyes have rested, and You are the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining

duas.title: Last Verse Before Sleep
duas.arabic: آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ رَبِّهِ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ
duas.transliteration: Amanar-Rasulu bima unzila ilayhi mir-rabbihi wal-mu'minun
duas.translation: The Messenger has believed in what was revealed to him from his Lord, and so have the believers

duas.title: Starting a Journey
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin
duas.translation: Glory be to Him Who has subjected this to us, and we could not have accomplished it ourselves

duas.title: Returning from Journey
duas.arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
duas.transliteration: Ayibuna ta'ibuna 'abiduna lirabbina hamidun
duas.translation: We are returning, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord

duas.title: Entering a Town
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَمَا أَظْلَلْنَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabbas-samawatis-sab'i wa ma azlalna
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens and all they shade

duas.title: Fear During Travel
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِمْ وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inna naj'aluka fi nuhurihim wa na'udhu bika min shururihim
duas.translation: O Allah, we place You before them and seek refuge in You from their evil

duas.title: Against Evil
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahit-tammati min kulli shaytanin wa hammah
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from every devil and poisonous creature

duas.title: Leaving the House
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi tawakkaltu 'alallahi wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah. There is no might or power except with Allah

duas.title: Entering the House
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'ala Allahi rabbina tawakkalna
duas.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we rely

duas.title: Against Anxiety
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow

duas.title: Against Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْمَأْثَمِ وَالْمَغْرَمِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-ma'thami wal-maghram
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from sin and debt

duas.title: General Praise
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahi Rabbil-'alamin
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah, Lord of all the worlds

duas.title: After Sneezing
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillah
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah

duas.title: When Something Good Happens
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi bini'matihi tatimmus-salihat
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah by Whose grace good deeds are completed

duas.title: When Seeing Someone Afflicted
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلَاكَ بِهِ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi 'afani mimma-btalaka bihi
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah Who has saved me from what He has afflicted you with

duas.title: For Beneficial Knowledge
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an wa rizqan tayyiban wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds

duas.title: For Guidance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي وَسَدِّدْنِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-hdini wa saddidni
duas.translation: O Allah, guide me and keep me on the right path

duas.title: When Studying
duas.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilma
duas.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge

duas.title: For Understanding
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَقِّهْنِي فِي الدِّينِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma faqqihni fid-din
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me understanding in the religion

duas.title: When Visiting the Sick
duas.arabic: أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ رَبَّ النَّاسِ اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ
duas.transliteration: Adhhibil-ba'sa Rabban-nas, ishfi antash-Shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uka
duas.translation: Remove the hardship, O Lord of mankind. Grant healing, for You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing

duas.title: When in Pain
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi'izatillahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhir
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah's might and power from the evil of what I feel and fear

duas.title: For Good Health
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'afini fi badani, Allahumma 'afini fi sam'i, Allahumma 'afini fi basari
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me health in my body. O Allah, grant me health in my hearing. O Allah, grant me health in my sight
